description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with two stages named security_release:backport_merge:start and security_release:backport_merge. Add a manual job called security_release_backport_merge:start in the start stage that extends .common-job-setup, has no dependencies, runs the exact command `bundle exec rake 'security:backport_merge:start'`, and is triggered only when CI_PIPELINE_SOURCE matches pipeline, web, or api and the variable SECURITY_RELEASE_PIPELINE matches backport_merge or true. Add a job called security_release_backport_merge:merge in the merge stage that extends .security-release-backport-merge-base and .common-ci-tokens, needs the start job, runs the exact command `bundle exec rake 'security:merge'`, and uses the same rule conditions as the start job. Both jobs inherit any common setup defined in the extended templates.
